---
description: "Workspace-level instructions for AI coding agents when the repository has no source files yet."
---

## Overview
This workspace currently contains no source code, documentation, or build scripts.

## Guidance for AI agents
- Confirm the workspace is empty before making assumptions about language, framework, or project structure.
- Ask the user to add files or describe the intended project if no code is present.
- If the user provides a project description, request file structure details and any preferred tooling.
- Do not infer build, test, or dependency management commands from an empty repository.

## When project files appear
- Update this file with the chosen language, framework, build/test commands, and repository conventions.
- Link to any project documentation or existing README once those files are added.
